tags.name: Errors
tags.description:
## Error responses

Every error response uses this envelope:

```json
{
  "success": false,
  "code": "QUOTES_EXPIRED",
  "message": "quote_expired",
  "description": "This quote has expired. Request a new quote and try again.",
  "errors": [],
  "trace_id": "0af7651916cd43dd8448eb211c80319c"
}
```

- `code` is a stable identifier, safe to build programmatic handling on.
- `message` is a legacy machine string kept for backward compatibility. Prefer `code`.
- `description` is human-readable text, safe to show to end users.
- `trace_id` identifies the request. Include it when contacting support.

Retry semantics per code: `retryable` means the same request can be retried as is, `terminal` means do not retry, and `actionable` means the request succeeds only after you fix something (for example funding a balance or correcting bank details).

The Status column shows the HTTP status a code typically responds with; the per-endpoint error tabs list the exact status each endpoint returns.

### Error codes

| Code | Status | Retry | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `AUTH_EMAIL_ALREADY_REGISTERED` | 409 | terminal | This email address is already registered. |
| `AUTH_FORBIDDEN` | 403 | terminal | You do not have permission to perform this action. |
| `AUTH_IP_BLOCKED` | 403 | terminal | Requests from this IP address are not allowed for this API key. |
| `AUTH_RATE_LIMITED` | 429 | retryable | Too many requests. Wait a moment and try again. |
| `AUTH_SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE` | 503 | retryable | The authentication service is temporarily unavailable. Try again shortly. |
| `AUTH_TOKEN_INVALID` | 401 | actionable | This link or token is invalid or has expired. Request a new one. |
| `AUTH_UNAUTHORIZED` | 401 | actionable | Authentication failed. Check your API key or session and try again. |
| `BANK_ACCOUNTS_INCOMPLETE` | 400 | actionable | The bank account details are incomplete for this payment method. Provide the missing fields. |
| `BANK_ACCOUNTS_INVALID_BANK_CODE` | 400 | actionable | The bank code provided is not valid for this payment rail. The message lists where to fetch the valid codes. |
| `BANK_ACCOUNTS_INVALID_ROUTING` | 400 | actionable | The routing number provided is not valid. Check the number and try again. |
| `BANK_ACCOUNTS_NOT_APPROVED` | 403 | actionable | This bank account is not approved yet. |
| `BANK_ACCOUNTS_NOT_FOUND` | 404 | actionable | The requested bank account was not found. |
| `BANK_ACCOUNTS_PARTNER_NOT_SUPPORTED` | 400 | terminal | This banking option is not supported for this operation. |
| `BANK_ACCOUNTS_RTP_NOT_SUPPORTED` | 400 | terminal | The provided routing number does not support instant payments. |
| `BILLING_INVOICE_NOT_FOUND` | 404 | actionable | The requested invoice was not found. |
| `BILLING_INVOICE_NOT_PAYABLE` | 409 | terminal | This invoice cannot be paid or collected in its current state. |
| `BILLING_NOT_AVAILABLE` | 403 | terminal | Billing is not available for development instances. |
| `BLOCKCHAIN_CALL_FAILED` | 400 | retryable | The blockchain call could not be completed. Check the transaction details and try again. |
| `BLOCKCHAIN_NETWORK_NOT_SUPPORTED` | 400 | terminal | This network or token combination is not supported for this operation. |
| `BLOCKCHAIN_TX_FAILED` | 502 | retryable | The blockchain transaction failed. Try again, and contact support if the problem persists. |
| `COMPLIANCE_RFI_IN_PROGRESS` | 409 | actionable | An information request is already in progress. Resolve it before continuing. |
| `COMPLIANCE_RFI_INVALID` | 400 | actionable | The information request could not be processed. Check the submitted fields. |
| `DATA_INTEGRITY_ERROR` | 422 | terminal | This record could not be loaded because it contains invalid stored data. Contact support with the ID below. |
| `FEES_NOT_FOUND` | 404 | actionable | The requested fee configuration was not found. |
| `FEES_PARTNER_FEE_EXCEEDED` | 400 | actionable | The partner fee exceeds the allowed maximum for this transaction. |
| `FILES_ANALYSIS_FAILED` | 502 | retryable | The document could not be analyzed. Try again, and contact support if the problem persists. |
| `FILES_EMPTY` | 400 | actionable | The uploaded file is empty. Upload a valid file. |
| `FILES_TOO_LARGE` | 400 | actionable | The file is too large. Upload a smaller file. |
| `FILES_TYPE_NOT_ALLOWED` | 400 | actionable | This file type is not allowed. Upload a supported file type. |
| `FILES_UNREADABLE` | 400 | actionable | We could not read the uploaded file. Check the file and try again. |
| `INSTANCES_BLOCKED` | 403 | terminal | This account is blocked. Contact support for assistance. |
| `INSTANCES_LIMIT_REACHED` | 400 | terminal | You reached the maximum number of instances allowed for your account. |
| `INSTANCES_NOT_FOUND` | 404 | actionable | The requested instance was not found. |
| `INTERNAL_ERROR` | 500 | retryable | Something went wrong on our side. Try again, and contact support with the trace ID if the problem persists. |
| `LIMITS_AMOUNT_OUT_OF_RANGE` | 400 | actionable | The amount is outside the allowed range. The message includes the allowed range. |
| `LIMITS_VOLUME_EXCEEDED` | 400 | actionable | You exceeded your transaction volume limit. The message includes the remaining amount available. |
| `PAYINS_ALREADY_TERMINAL` | 409 | terminal | This payin already reached a final status and cannot be changed. |
| `PAYINS_METHOD_NOT_SUPPORTED` | 400 | terminal | This payment method is not supported for this operation. |
| `PAYINS_NOT_FOUND` | 404 | actionable | The requested payin was not found. |
| `PAYINS_TAX_ID_REQUIRED` | 400 | actionable | A tax ID is required for this payment method. Provide the tax ID and try again. |
| `PAYOUTS_ALLOWANCE_NOT_CONFIRMED` | 400 | retryable | The token approval for this payout has not been confirmed on-chain yet, or the approved amount is lower than the payout amount. Wait for the approval transaction to confirm and execute the quote again. |
| `PAYOUTS_AMOUNT_BELOW_MINIMUM` | 400 | actionable | The amount is below the minimum for this payment rail. |
| `PAYOUTS_DOCUMENTS_NOT_ACCEPTED` | 400 | terminal | Document upload is only available for international wire payouts. |
| `PAYOUTS_INSUFFICIENT_BALANCE` | 400 | actionable | There is not enough balance to complete this payout. Fund your balance and try again. |
| `PAYOUTS_NOT_FOUND` | 404 | actionable | The requested payout was not found. |
| `QUOTES_ALREADY_USED` | 409 | actionable | This quote was already used. Request a new quote. |
| `QUOTES_EXPIRED` | 400 | actionable | This quote has expired. Request a new quote and try again. |
| `QUOTES_INSUFFICIENT_LIQUIDITY` | 400 | actionable | There is not enough market liquidity to fill this amount right now. Try a smaller amount or try again later. |
| `QUOTES_INVALID_STATE` | 400 | actionable | This quote cannot be authorized in its current state. Request a new quote and try again. |
| `QUOTES_NOT_FOUND` | 404 | actionable | The requested quote was not found. |
| `QUOTES_OTC_NOT_SUPPORTED` | 400 | actionable | This OTC configuration is not supported. OTC requires BRL with USDT, and either the sender amount with fees not covered, or the receiver amount with fees covered. |
| `QUOTES_RATE_UNAVAILABLE` | 502 | retryable | An exchange rate is temporarily unavailable. Try again shortly. |
| `RECEIVERS_ALREADY_APPROVED` | 409 | terminal | This receiver is already approved. |
| `RECEIVERS_COUNTRY_NOT_SUPPORTED` | 400 | terminal | This country is not supported for this operation. |
| `RECEIVERS_ID_DOCUMENT_INVALID` | 400 | actionable | The identity document is not an accepted passport or national ID. Provide a valid passport or national ID for this receiver (a driver license is not accepted for high-risk countries). |
| `RECEIVERS_INVALID_DATA` | 422 | actionable | The receiver data was rejected by the banking provider. Check the highlighted fields and try again. |
| `RECEIVERS_INVALID_PHONE` | 400 | actionable | The phone number provided is not valid. Check the number and try again. |
| `RECEIVERS_INVALID_TAX_ID` | 400 | actionable | The tax ID provided is not valid. Check the value and try again. |
| `RECEIVERS_KYC_NOT_APPROVED` | 403 | actionable | This receiver has not completed verification yet. Complete the verification before continuing. |
| `RECEIVERS_NOT_FOUND` | 404 | actionable | The requested receiver was not found. |
| `RECEIVERS_ONBOARDING_INCOMPLETE` | 400 | actionable | Onboarding is not complete yet. Finish the remaining steps before continuing. |
| `TOS_ALREADY_ACCEPTED` | 409 | terminal | These terms of service were already accepted. |
| `TOS_NOT_ACCEPTED` | 400 | actionable | The terms of service must be accepted before continuing. |
| `TOS_NOT_FOUND` | 404 | actionable | The requested terms of service record was not found. |
| `TRANSFERS_NOT_ENABLED` | 403 | terminal | Wallets and transfers are not enabled for this account. Contact support to enable them. |
| `VALIDATION_FAILED` | 400 | actionable | The request contains invalid fields. Check the errors list for details. |
| `VALIDATION_INVALID_REQUEST` | 400 | actionable | The request is not valid for this operation. Check the parameters and try again. |
| `VALIDATION_MISSING_BODY` | 400 | actionable | The request body is missing or malformed. Send valid JSON with the Content-Type: application/json header. |
| `VALIDATION_MISSING_REQUIRED_FIELDS` | 400 | actionable | Required fields are missing. Provide the missing fields and try again. |
| `VIRTUAL_ACCOUNTS_DISABLED` | 403 | terminal | Virtual accounts are not enabled for this account. Contact support to enable them. |
| `VIRTUAL_ACCOUNTS_DOCUMENTS_REQUIRED` | 400 | actionable | Additional documents are required to create this virtual account. Upload the requested documents. |
| `VIRTUAL_ACCOUNTS_NOT_APPROVED` | 403 | actionable | This virtual account is not approved yet. |
| `VIRTUAL_ACCOUNTS_NOT_FOUND` | 404 | actionable | The requested virtual account was not found. |
| `VIRTUAL_ACCOUNTS_PROVISION_FAILED` | 502 | retryable | We could not create the virtual account. Try again, and contact support if the problem persists. |
| `VIRTUAL_ACCOUNTS_REGION_NOT_SUPPORTED` | 400 | terminal | Virtual accounts are not available for this country or region. |
| `WALLETS_BALANCE_UNAVAILABLE` | 503 | retryable | The wallet balance is temporarily unavailable. Try again shortly. |
| `WALLETS_NOT_FOUND` | 404 | actionable | The requested wallet was not found. |
| `WEBHOOKS_LIMIT_REACHED` | 400 | terminal | You reached the maximum number of webhook endpoints. |
| `WEBHOOKS_SIGNATURE_INVALID` | 401 | terminal | The webhook signature is missing or invalid. |
| `WEBHOOKS_URL_INVALID` | 400 | actionable | The webhook URL is not valid. Use a reachable HTTPS URL. |

code.description: Stable error code. See the Error codes section for the full list.

message.description: Legacy machine-readable message. Prefer `code` for programmatic handling.

description.description: Human-readable explanation, safe to show to end users.
description.example: There is not enough balance to complete this payout. Fund your balance and try again.

trace_id.description: Request trace ID. Include it when contacting support.

approval_rate.description: Confidence that the document should be approved.

description.description: Short explanation of why the document should or should not be approved.

file.description: The document to analyze (PDF, JPG, or PNG).

type.description: The kind of document being analyzed. Selects the rule set used for the analysis.

metadata.description: Optional JSON object of expected values to verify against the document (e.g. {"full_name":"Jane Doe","date_of_birth":"1990-01-01"}). When provided, a clear mismatch caps the rating at low.

expires_at.description: Epoch unix timestamp that represents the final datetime to transaction be received on blockchain. For SEPA payouts this may be shorter than the default 5 minute window if Circle CPN returns an earlier expiry.

sender_amount.description: 10.10 USDC needs to be sent to bank account blockchain address

billing_fee_amount.description: Billing fee in cents (charged via invoice at the end of the month)

items.description: Contract abi related to the network you send in request params

address.description: Token address related to the network you send in request params

functionName.description: Function name from ERC20 smart contract

amount.description: Amount to approve with correct decimal places

receiver_local_amount.description: Estimated amount in the currency of recipient bank account

description.example: Memo code or description, only works with USD and BRL

cover_fees.description: If true, the sender will cover the fees. If false, the receiver will cover the fees.

description.example: Memo code or description, only works with USD and BRL

partner_fee.description: Payout partner fee amount in cents (can be negative for rebates)

post.description: Prepares a delegation transaction for Solana token transfers. You can either provide a `quote_id` (recommended) to automatically use the correct token amount and address from the quote, or manually provide `owner_address`, `token_address`, and `amount`.

schema.description: Optional key to safely retry this request without performing the action twice. Retrying with the same key and an identical body replays the original response; reusing a key with a different body returns an error. Keys are kept for 24 hours.

owner_address.description: The Solana wallet address that owns the tokens

quote_id.description: The quote ID. When provided, the API will automatically use the sender_amount and token_address from the quote. This is the recommended approach.

token_address.description: The SPL token mint address. Required if quote_id is not provided.

amount.description: The token amount to delegate in USDC/USDT units (e.g., "10.5" for 10.5 USDC). Required if quote_id is not provided. Note: This should be the TOKEN amount, not the local currency amount.
